title: F1 2022 Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2022 texturepack by AdamixGaming | required OptiFine!!!
body:
Safety car
all boat with chest (without bamboo raft)
No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car

oak_boat

    Ferrari 16,55
    Alfa Romeo 77,24

spruce_boat

    Alpha Tauri 22,10
    Haas 20,27

birch_boat

    Alpine 14,31

jungle_boat

    RedBull 1,11

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 4,4

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 44,63

cherry_boat

    Aston Martin 5,18

mangrove_boat

    Williams 23,6

**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove>",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<soft | medium | hard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"22_hard\""}
